title: croton ferrugineus var. collinus
intro: Croton ferrugineus var. collinus, also known as the Colline Croton, is a variety of the Croton ferrugineus plant, a type of shrub native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton ferrugineus var. collinus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and roots, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or used in traditional remedies.
